scripts.dev:all: NEXT_PUBLIC_DREDGING_MARINE_APP_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_DREDGING_MARINE_APP_URL:-http://localhost:3121} NEXT_PUBLIC_INFRA_APP_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_INFRA_APP_URL:-http://localhost:3122} NEXT_PUBLIC_LTS_APP_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_LTS_APP_URL:-http://localhost:3123} npm run dev -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3120 & npm run dev:dm -- -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3121 & npm run dev:infra -- -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3122 & npm run dev:lts -- -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3123
scripts.build:dm: npm --prefix apps/nmdc-dredging-marine run build && node scripts/copy-standalone-assets.mjs dm
scripts.build:infra: npm --prefix apps/nmdc-infra run build && node scripts/copy-standalone-assets.mjs infra
scripts.build:lts: npm --prefix apps/nmdc-lts run build && node scripts/copy-standalone-assets.mjs lts
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:dm && npm run build:infra && npm run build:lts
scripts.start:all: NEXT_PUBLIC_DREDGING_MARINE_APP_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_DREDGING_MARINE_APP_URL:-http://localhost:3121} NEXT_PUBLIC_INFRA_APP_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_INFRA_APP_URL:-http://localhost:3122} NEXT_PUBLIC_LTS_APP_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_LTS_APP_URL:-http://localhost:3123} PORT=3120 HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 npm run start & PORT=3121 HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 npm run start:dm & PORT=3122 HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 npm run start:infra & PORT=3123 HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 npm run start:lts
